chunks.content:
Article: This is depressing and hilarious at the same time
[]: This is depressing and hilarious at the same time             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Dec 28, 2006 2:10 am Alright, so I was looking at the Flash toons on the front page of Newgrounds and one of them (a Cosmo Kramer hentai game... apparently it's the third one in a series ) mentioned Evangelion in one of the reviews, so I looked at the rest of the reviews and did a keyword search in them for "eva". This is an excerpt from one of the reviews: Evangelion has the words Eva, Angel, and Lion in its name. Eva closely resembles Eve. Lion is for Adam and a whole mess of other Biblical references. And angel is just a dead give a way. The show its self has Judeo-Christian symbols from the book of Genesis and biblical apocrypha. So I believe you owe an apology for saying that Evangelion didn't make sense.

[]: Re: This is depressing and hilarious at the same time             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Dec 28, 2006 5:00 am Evangelion has the words Eva, Angel, and Lion in its name. Eva closely resembles Eve. Lion is for Adam and a whole mess of other Biblical references. And angel is just a dead give a way.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 28, 2006 1:06 pm lol desu yo.

(ie: People that leave comments about Eva episodes on Youtube seem to be really stupid.) I'm kinda in a bad mood right now, please don't mind me (pissed off at myself, don't ask.)
